assertions.title: CsvAlignError → IntoResponse mapping tested
assertions.reasoning: Found a dedicated test (tests/response_contracts.rs:111) that iterates CsvAlignError variants and asserts both HTTP status and JSON body shape, then executed that test successfully.

steps.expected: A test explicitly verifies CsvAlignError variant-to-status and JSON contract
steps.observed: Test `csv_align_error_variants_map_to_documented_http_status` found; it asserts `IntoResponse` status and `{code,error}` JSON for NotFound, Validation, BadInput, Parse, Io, Internal

assertions.title: tracing spans present on handler entry points
assertions.reasoning: Static coverage check reports 11/11 Axum handlers and 10/10 tauri commands instrumented, and both root and src-tauri clippy runs are clean.

steps.action: Verify Axum and tauri entry-point instrumentation coverage
steps.expected: Every Axum handler and every #[tauri::command] has tracing instrumentation
steps.observed: Coverage script reported axum_handlers_instrumented=11/11 and tauri_commands_instrumented=10/10 with no missing entries
Both root and src-tauri clippy commands exited 0

commands.command: python3 instrumentation coverage script over src/api/handlers.rs and src-tauri/src/main.rs

summary: Validated 2 assertions on repo-checks surface: VAL-LIB-012 pass, VAL-LIB-014 pass.
